name: Paul Brink
background: Mr. Brink is the President and Chief Executive Officer of Franco-Nevada. He has been with the Company since its IPO in 2007 and has held various roles including President and Chief Operating Officer. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

company_affiliations.name: Franco-Nevada Corporation
company_affiliations.title_or_role: President & Chief Executive Officer and Director
